channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines curated by AI

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran creates Strait Authority, declares controlled maritime zone at Hormuz
item.description: Iran newly established Persian Gulf Strait Authority announced a controlled maritime zone at the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions as Trump threatens to restart military action.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚔️ Iranian public receives gun training as war fears mount
item.description: Revolutionary Guard members are teaching civilians to handle assault rifles in Tehran, with weapons displays and missiles featured at public events amid Trump threats to restart the war.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇷🇺 Xi-Putin summit strengthens China-Russia strategic ties in Beijing
item.description: Putin met Xi in Beijing just days after Trump visited, highlighting strong trust between Beijing and Moscow and China ability to manage ties with both major powers.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇬🇱 US envoy pushes to reestablish military presence in Greenland
item.description: US special envoy Jeff Landry says Washington needs to put its footprint back on Greenland, with plans for three new bases as Trump pursues control of the Arctic territory.

item.title: 🇱🇧⛪ South Lebanon cultural heritage destroyed amid Israeli buffer zone creation
item.description: Lebanese activists document widespread demolition of religious structures and historic sites as Israel establishes a forward defence zone encompassing 55 villages since April ceasefire.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Consolidates Control of Strait of Hormuz with Island Checkpoints
item.description: Iran has established a multi-tiered checkpoint system for vessel clearance through the Strait of Hormuz, using diplomatic deals and sometimes fees. The US has warned against complying with Iranian controls as some shippers and governments take the risk.

item.title: 🦠 Ebola Outbreak Response Hindered by US Aid Cuts Under Trump
item.description: Aid cuts by the Trump administration have shut down crucial disease surveillance networks and medical supply chains in East Africa, potentially hampering efforts to contain the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

item.title: 🇱🇹 Lithuanian Lawmakers Shelter as Drone Violates Airspace Near Belarus Border
item.description: Residents of Vilnius were told to take shelter and Lithuanian leaders were moved to safe locations after a drone violated airspace near the Belarus border, highlighting NATO eastern flank security concerns.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Bank of England Has Time to Gauge Iran War Economic Impact
item.description: A rise in market interest rates since the start of the Iran war has given the Bank of England more time to assess the economic impact of the conflict, according to Governor Andrew Bailey.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia Crude Exports Drop to Record Low in March
item.description: Saudi Arabia's crude oil exports fell to a record low of 4.974 million barrels per day in March, the lowest level since data collection began in 2002, according to JODI data.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇷🇺 Xi and Putin hail growing China-Russia ties in Beijing meeting
item.description: Chinese leader Xi Jinping and Russian President Vladimir Putin oversaw the signing of 40+ cooperation agreements and declared their partnership at its highest level in history, extending a 2001 friendship treaty.

item.title: 🦠 Rare Ebola type spreads rapidly in eastern Congo
item.description: Healthcare workers warn they are underprepared as the Bundibugyo virus Ebola outbreak spreads in Congo, with 51 confirmed cases and 139 suspected deaths amid conflict zones.

item.title: 🕵️ Austrian ex-intelligence officer found guilty of Russia spying charges
item.description: Former Austrian intelligence official Egisto Ott was sentenced to four years for passing sensitive information to Russian intelligence and Wirecard fugitive Jan Marsalek.

item.title: 🇨🇺 US indicts former Cuban president Raúl Castro over 1996 plane downing
item.description: The US Justice Department charged the 94-year-old former Cuban leader with conspiracy to kill US nationals and murder for the 1996 shooting down of two humanitarian planes that killed four people.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan President Lai Asserts Only Taiwan Can Decide Its Future
item.description: President Lai Ching-te stated Taiwan's future must not be decided by external forces and cannot be held hostage by fear, drawing an angry reaction from Beijing.

item.title: 🇯🇵 US Marines Test Fire Rocket System Near Mount Fuji in Rapid Drill
item.description: US Marines test fired a dozen rockets from a mobile launcher at a range in Japan's foothills near Mount Fuji, demonstrating "shoot and scoot" capabilities.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Plans 260,000-Strong Bundeswehr as US Pullout Accelerates European Rearmament
item.description: Defense Minister Boris Pistorius called for expanding the Bundeswehr to 260,000 soldiers, reversing 30 years of force reductions as the US military withdrawal from Europe spurs unprecedented defense buildup.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey's Erdogan Tells Trump Iran Issues Can Be Resolved
item.description: Turkish President Erdogan told Trump in a call he welcomed the extension of a ceasefire and believes issues with Iran can be resolved, positioning Turkey as a potential mediator.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky Marks Seven Years in Office as War Defines Legacy
item.description: Seven years after taking office as a showman turned wartime leader, Zelensky's legacy is now inextricably tied to the ongoing conflict with Russia.

item.title: 🇷🇺☢️ Russia conducts nuclear warhead transport exercise amid tensions with West
item.description: Russian forces demonstrated movement of nuclear warheads in a three-day exercise, showcasing capability at a time when Moscow describes itself in an existential struggle with the West over Ukraine.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇱🇹 Kremlin calls Lithuanian minister Kaliningrad comments verging on insanity
item.description: Russia sharply criticized Lithuania after its foreign minister said NATO should demonstrate capability to penetrate the Russian exclave of Kaliningrad, calling the remarks "verging on insanity."

item.title: 🛢️📉 Oil prices fall 6% as Trump says Iran negotiations in final stages
item.description: Crude oil dropped sharply after President Trump announced that peace talks with Iran were nearing completion, though markets remain cautious about the outcome.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Used Triangular Coercion in Gulf Strategy
item.description: Outmatched militarily, Iran attacked Gulf states and closed the Strait of Hormuz using asymmetric tactics, revealing a long-term U.S. strategic vulnerability.

item.title: ⚠️ Iran Warns of War Beyond Gulf Region if US Attacks Again
item.description: Iran Revolutionary Guards threatens retaliation in places beyond the region if the U.S. or Israel launch new attacks, as Trump says he was an hour away from striking.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇪🇺 Chinese investment in Europe surges to 7-year high despite trade tensions
item.description: Chinese FDI in Europe hit a seven-year peak, but analysts warn the pipeline of new projects is drying up as investors face pressure from both Beijing and European capitals.
